name: candidate-360-nps
description: Candidate 360° Post-interview NPS Dashboard - Full Stack Application

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run docker:up"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:prod: cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:reset: cd backend && npx prisma migrate reset
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run docker:up && npm run db:generate && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed

author: Talent AI
